creator: g.veniamin@googlemail.com
text:
Sorry,
I do not know what impact caused the kernel panic.

ns# kldstat

    at /mnt/freebsd/src/7/sys/i386/i386/trap.c:686

    arg=0xc2927c00, frame=0xd4cced38)
    at /mnt/freebsd/src/7/sys/kern/kern_fork.c:783
#10 0xc086f0a0 in fork_trampoline ()
    at /mnt/freebsd/src/7/sys/i386/i386/exception.s:205
(kgdb)
